name: lilguy
description: Discord bot that converts links between Spotify and YouTube Music

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/services/url-parser.test.js dist/services/matching.test.js dist/services/converter.test.js dist/services/ttl-cache.test.js dist/services/candidate-selection.test.js dist/services/orchestrion-search.test.js dist/services/xivapi.test.js
